creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: pkg(8) doesn't use ports except some bits like INDEX for "pkg version" or UPDATING for "pkg updating". *_DEPENDS is for ports framework to check dependencies, not for "pkg upgrade". ports use pkg to prevent installing vulnerable version, check package version in (BUILD|RUN)_DEPENDS=foo>=1.2:bar/foo syntax, install staged files according to plist and register installed ports (as packages).
